# SlotBoost

> AI-powered dynamic pricing platform for service professionals. Transforms empty appointment slots into revenue using intelligent, time-sensitive discounts.

## What SlotBoost Does

SlotBoost is a SaaS web application that helps service professionals (salons, fitness coaches, physiotherapists, tutors, consultants) automatically fill last-minute appointment cancellations and empty slots using dynamic pricing algorithms and WhatsApp flash deal alerts.

## Key Features

- **Lead-Time Discounts**: Automatically applies discounts (up to 25%) as appointment slots approach their start time.
- **Peak/Off-Peak Heatmap**: A configurable 7×24 demand index adjusts prices based on your busiest and slowest hours.
- **Smart D_max Cap**: A configurable maximum discount percentage — SlotBoost never discounts beyond the professional's floor price.
- **Cancellation Recovery Flash Deals**: When a slot is cancelled, a 15% flash deal window (10 minutes) activates automatically to fill the opening.
- **Waitlist Autopilot**: Notifies waitlisted clients via WhatsApp (Twilio sandbox) when a slot reopens after cancellation.
- **Server-Side Pricing Cron**: Prices are recalculated every 15 minutes and computed server-side on each booking action.

## Who Is It For?

Service professionals with bookable time slots who want to:
- Reduce revenue lost to last-minute cancellations
- Fill otherwise empty off-peak slots with incentivized pricing
- Automate client notification and waitlist management

Examples: hair salons, barbershops, yoga studios, personal trainers, physiotherapy clinics, music teachers, life coaches.

## Technology Stack

- **Framework**: Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19
- **Database**: PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM
- **Auth**: JWT in httpOnly cookies
- **Notifications**: Twilio WhatsApp sandbox
- **Geo Routing**: OSRM + Nominatim (no Maps API key required)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4, Shadcn UI

## Pricing

- **Starter (Free)**: Up to 20 slots/month, SMS notifications, basic heatmap, D_max up to 30%
- **Pro (₹999/month)**: Unlimited slots, SMS + WhatsApp, full heatmap, D_max up to 60%, waitlist autopilot

## How Dynamic Pricing Works (Step-by-Step)

1. Professional sets base price and availability for each appointment slot
2. Professional configures a 7×24 demand heatmap and a D_max discount cap
3. Every 15 minutes, the SlotBoost cron recalculates prices for upcoming slots
4. As a slot's lead time shrinks, the lead-time discount increases (up to 25%)
5. Heatmap modifier adds or subtracts additional discount based on day/hour demand index
6. Combined discount is capped at D_max — never going below the professional's floor
7. Clients see the discounted price in real time; flash deal alerts go out via WhatsApp on cancellations

## Definitions

- **D_max**: Maximum allowed total discount percentage, set by the professional
- **D_cancel**: Additional cancellation flash deal discount (15%), active for 10 minutes post-cancellation
- **Lead-Time Discount**: Price reduction applied as the time until appointment decreases
- **Heatmap Modifier**: Demand-based multiplier from the 7×24 peak/off-peak configuration
- **Waitlist Autopilot**: Automated WhatsApp notification to queued clients when a slot becomes available

## Links

- **Live App**: https://slotboost-dynamic-pricing.vercel.app
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/jjf2009/slotboost-dynamic-pricing
- **Documentation**: See /docs directory for SRS, design doc, and test plan
